text:
There once was an empty barn.

Inside it sat Oliver.

In winter Oliver slept alone.

One day Oliver dreamed big dreams.

Of rainbows.

They met.

Together rainbows danced.

They sailed an ocean rainbow.

In dreams Oliver flew.

But rainbows whispered nothing can fly.

Then Oliver flew anyway.

He dreamed.

He dreamed big mountains climbed rainbow trees.

It snowed stars everywhere.

Oliver lived rainbow lives.

They gathered stars for rainbows.

His heart fluttered with love.

Oliver smiled.

They danced.

That's OK.



That's enough.




Oliver woke up.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
